properties.title: Narrow crossing at Elgeseter
properties.description: Pedestrians and bikes stack up here during peak hours because the waiting area is too tight.

properties.title: Painted lane fades near river route
properties.description: Wayfinding and lane markings become unclear along this stretch, especially in rain.

properties.title: Conflict zone outside station
properties.description: Large flows of buses, bikes, and walkers overlap in this area and visibility is limited.
